subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-13
subcodes.first_line: It is a few days since my arrival in New York; but before coming to New York
subcodes.first_line_orig: چند روز است من به نیویورک آمدم پیش از این به اروپا رفتم
subcodes.subjects: @man's distinction from the animal, @power of the mind over nature, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @harmony of science and religion, @mind as principle emanation; activity of the human spirit
